Class MedicalStaff

java.lang.Object
model.MedicalStaff
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class MedicalStaff extends Object implements Serializable
Represents a doctor or medical staff member using the platform.
See Also:

  • Constructor Details

    • MedicalStaff

      public MedicalStaff(String id, String firstName, String lastName, String role, String email, String phoneNumber, Hospital hospital)
      Creates a medical staff member.
      Parameters:
      id - unique identifier
      firstName - first name
      lastName - last name
      role - role in the hospital
      email - email address
      phoneNumber - phone number
      hospital - hospital where the staff member works

  • Method Details

    • createDeliveryRequest

      public DeliveryRequest createDeliveryRequest(CollectionCenter origin, Hospital destination, String organType, PriorityLevel priorityLevel)
      Creates a delivery request.
      Parameters:
      origin - collection center
      destination - destination hospital
      organType - organ type
      priorityLevel - medical priority level
      Returns:
      created delivery request
